---
title: "My Current Agenda"
description-meta: "Ongoing literature reviews, methods notes, and posts — computational social science."
page-navigation: true
toc: false
format:
  html:
    title-block: false
---

::: {data-lang="en"}

```{=html}
<section class="agenda-page" aria-label="Current agenda">
  <header class="agenda-hero">
    <p class="agenda-kicker">Live board</p>
    <h1 class="agenda-title">My Current Agenda</h1>
    <p class="agenda-lead">Track what I am reading, writing, and shipping — literature, methods, and short outputs from ELRI, OLES, and FONDECYT work.</p>
  </header>

  <div class="agenda-toolbar" role="toolbar" aria-label="Filter agenda items">
    <button type="button" class="agenda-filter is-active" data-filter="all">All</button>
    <button type="button" class="agenda-filter" data-filter="literature">Literature</button>
    <button type="button" class="agenda-filter" data-filter="methods">Methods</button>
    <button type="button" class="agenda-filter" data-filter="outputs">Posts &amp; notes</button>
  </div>

  <div class="agenda-grid" id="agenda-grid-en">
    <article class="agenda-card" data-category="literature" style="--card-accent: #2563eb;">
      <span class="agenda-chip agenda-chip--active">In progress</span>
      <h2 class="agenda-card-title">Political discourse &amp; legitimacy</h2>
      <p class="agenda-card-body">Literature reviews threading political discourse, police legitimacy, and computational text approaches (Chile &amp; comparative).</p>
      <ul class="agenda-card-meta">
        <li>ELRI / survey–text bridges</li>
        <li>Radical right discourse (Kast / Kaiser comparative frame)</li>
      </ul>
    </article>

    <article class="agenda-card" data-category="methods" style="--card-accent: #7c3aed;">
      <span class="agenda-chip agenda-chip--active">Ongoing</span>
      <h2 class="agenda-card-title">Pipelines &amp; reproducibility</h2>
      <p class="agenda-card-body">Notes on scraping, NLP workflows, tidy analysis, and keeping longitudinal corpora documented (targets, renv, Dataverse).</p>
      <ul class="agenda-card-meta">
        <li>R + Quarto for analysis memos</li>
        <li>Versioned scraping for press corpora</li>
      </ul>
    </article>

    <article class="agenda-card" data-category="outputs" style="--card-accent: #0d9488;">
      <span class="agenda-chip agenda-chip--queued">Next</span>
      <h2 class="agenda-card-title">Short posts &amp; project updates</h2>
      <p class="agenda-card-body">Commentaries and empirical snapshots from active collaborations — ELRI, OLES, FONDECYT “Right Wing in Dispute”.</p>
      <p class="agenda-card-link"><a href="posts.html">Browse all posts →</a></p>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>
```

:::

::: {data-lang="es" style="display: none;"}

```{=html}
<section class="agenda-page" aria-label="Agenda actual">
  <header class="agenda-hero">
    <p class="agenda-kicker">Tablero en vivo</p>
    <h1 class="agenda-title">Mi agenda actual</h1>
    <p class="agenda-lead">Seguimiento de lectura, notas de métodos y entregas breves — ciencia social computacional en proyectos ELRI, OLES y FONDECYT.</p>
  </header>

  <div class="agenda-toolbar" role="toolbar" aria-label="Filtrar ítems">
    <button type="button" class="agenda-filter is-active" data-filter="all">Todo</button>
    <button type="button" class="agenda-filter" data-filter="literature">Literatura</button>
    <button type="button" class="agenda-filter" data-filter="methods">Métodos</button>
    <button type="button" class="agenda-filter" data-filter="outputs">Posts y notas</button>
  </div>

  <div class="agenda-grid" id="agenda-grid-es">
    <article class="agenda-card" data-category="literature" style="--card-accent: #2563eb;">
      <span class="agenda-chip agenda-chip--active">En curso</span>
      <h2 class="agenda-card-title">Discurso político y legitimidad</h2>
      <p class="agenda-card-body">Revisiones de literatura que conectan discurso político, legitimidad policial y enfoques de texto computacional (Chile y comparado).</p>
      <ul class="agenda-card-meta">
        <li>ELRI / vínculos encuesta–texto</li>
        <li>Discurso de derecha radical (marco comparativo Kast / Kaiser)</li>
      </ul>
    </article>

    <article class="agenda-card" data-category="methods" style="--card-accent: #7c3aed;">
      <span class="agenda-chip agenda-chip--active">En curso</span>
      <h2 class="agenda-card-title">Pipelines y reproducibilidad</h2>
      <p class="agenda-card-body">Notas sobre scraping, flujos de NLP, análisis ordenado y documentación de corpus longitudinales (targets, renv, Dataverse).</p>
      <ul class="agenda-card-meta">
        <li>R + Quarto para memorias de análisis</li>
        <li>Scraping versionado de prensa</li>
      </ul>
    </article>

    <article class="agenda-card" data-category="outputs" style="--card-accent: #0d9488;">
      <span class="agenda-chip agenda-chip--queued">Próximo</span>
      <h2 class="agenda-card-title">Posts y actualizaciones</h2>
      <p class="agenda-card-body">Comentarios y instantáneas empíricas desde colaboraciones activas — ELRI, OLES, FONDECYT «La derecha en disputa».</p>
      <p class="agenda-card-link"><a href="posts.html">Ver todos los posts →</a></p>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>
```

:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  function wireGrid(grid) {
    if (!grid) return;
    var section = grid.closest(".agenda-page");
    if (!section) return;
    var buttons = section.querySelectorAll(".agenda-filter");
    buttons.forEach(function (btn) {
      btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
        var f = btn.getAttribute("data-filter") || "all";
        buttons.forEach(function (b) { b.classList.toggle("is-active", b === btn); });
        grid.querySelectorAll(".agenda-card").forEach(function (card) {
          var cat = card.getAttribute("data-category") || "";
          var show = f === "all" || cat === f;
          card.style.display = show ? "" : "none";
          card.classList.toggle("agenda-card--hidden", !show);
        });
      });
    });
  }
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    wireGrid(document.getElementById("agenda-grid-en"));
    wireGrid(document.getElementById("agenda-grid-es"));
  });
})();
</script>
```
